title: Fresh Juicy Mexican Chicken Tlayudas
description: A sour and juicy Mexican dish featuring pomegranate molasses and pickles, perfect for a brunch mood, this kosher friendly recipe is served on a large tlayudas.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together pomegranate molasses, pickle juice, lime juice, and olive oil.
Add the minced garlic to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the chicken breasts to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and bake in the oven for 25 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, toast the tlayudas in the oven for 5 minutes or until crispy.
Slice the cooked chicken into thin strips.
Assemble the tlayudas by spreading a layer of queso fresco on each, then topping with chicken, pickle slices, and cilantro.
Drizzle any remaining marinade over the top of the tlayudas and serve immediately.
